transcript: Speaker A (AI): What happened? Speaker B (Human): Water fell me. Speaker A: Idi tappu English. Ila cheppali: I spilled drink on myself. [This is wrong English. Say it like this: I spilled drink on myself.] Speaker B: I spilled drink on myself. Nenu eppudu tappulu chestuntanu. Nenu ituvanti manchi English eppudu nerchukuntanu? [I spilled drink on myself. I always make mistakes. When will I learn such good English?] Speaker A: Parvaledu, nenu neeku English matladadam nerpistanu. Ippudu oka prashna adugutanu. [No problem, I will teach you to speak English. Now I will ask a question.] Speaker B: Nenu ippudu adugutunnanu, idi subhram cheyyali, idi English lo ela adagali? [I am asking now, this needs to be cleaned, how to ask this in English?] Speaker A: Ila cheppu: I will have to clean this. [Say it like this: I will have to clean this.] Speaker B: I will have to clean this. Speaker A: Perfect. Speaker B: Evarnaina address adagalante? [If I want to ask someone's address?] Speaker A: Ila cheppu: Where do you live? [Say it like this: Where do you live?] Speaker B: Where do you live? Are, idi chala easy ga undi. Mariyu idi evaru judge kuda cheyaleru. [Where do you live? Oh, this is very easy. And no one can judge either.] Speaker A: Chala correct. English nerchukovadam chala easy. Roju 10-15 nimishalu natho practice chesthe, 2 vaarallo English matladadam nerchukuntavu. Nenu oka AI teacher ni, kabatti siggu padalsina avasaram ledu. Tappu chesthe ventane correct chesi cheptanu. [Very correct. Learning English is very easy. If you practice with me for 10-15 minutes daily, you will learn to speak English in 2 weeks. I am an AI teacher, so there is no need to feel shy. If you make a mistake, I will correct you immediately.] Speaker B: Thank you. Nenu ippude SpeakX app download chestunnanu. [Thank you. I am downloading the SpeakX app right now.]
on_screen_text: Water fell me. Idi tappu English [This is wrong English]. I spilled drink on myself. Nenu tappulu chesthanu [I make mistakes]. English eppudu nerchukuntaanu [When will I learn English]. Parvaledu nerpisthanu neeku [No problem, I will teach you]. English maatladadam ippudu [Speaking English now]. oka prashna aduguthanu [I will ask a question]. Idi subram cheyyali [This needs to be cleaned]. English ela cheppali [How to say in English]. Ila cheppu [Say it like this]. I will have to clean this. Address ela adagali? [How to ask address?]. Where do live?. Chala easy kada [Very easy, right]. Evaru judge cheyyaledu [No one can judge]. Chala correct [Very correct]. English nerchukovadam easy [Learning English is easy]. roju 10-15 nimishalu naatho [daily 10-15 minutes with me]. practice chesthe [if you practice]. 2 vaarallo English [English in 2 weeks]. maatladadam nerchukuntaavu [you will learn to speak]. nennu oka AI Teachrne [I am an AI teacher]. batti siku pedalsena avasarm ledu [no need to feel shy]. Tappu ventane correct [Mistake corrected immediately]. Siggu padalsina avasaram [Need to feel shy]. Nenu ippude Speak X app [I am right now Speak X app]. download chesthunnanu [downloading]. Download SpeakX App. Start 7 Days Trial Now.
summary: A split-screen ad featuring an AI avatar correcting a Telugu-speaking man's English mistakes in real-time. The man learns how easy and non-judgmental it is to practice English with an AI teacher. The ad ends with a call to download the SpeakX app and start a 7-day trial.
